description: This fall, most of the trending colours are saturated and bright in tone. Think fiery reds, fuchsia, burnt oranges, golden yellows and electric blues. These paint shades work alongside canvas colours such as olive, midnight black, grey and sand. Paint colours tend to be brighter, richer hues, whereas canvas colours are the neutral background shades that work alongside them.

rich_metadata.description: How do you create your capsule wardrobe for fall 2021? Find out all the colours and styles that are trending this season here.
